title: Travel on Sponsored Projects: Approval to Reimbursement — eTraining Module
display_label: Travel on Sponsored Projects eTraining (Articulate Rise)
content: Self-paced Articulate Rise module covering grant-funded travel from authorization through reimbursement. Walks through key MSU policy and federal Uniform Guidance rules, how to submit travel authorization requests properly, and how to file reimbursement claims that pass compliance review. Useful for PIs and staff traveling on sponsored projects or processing others' travel.
